scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn smallworld_api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080
scripts.dev:mcp: cd apps/api && uv run python -m smallworld_api.mcp.cli
scripts.dev:mcp:http: cd apps/api && uv run python -m smallworld_api.mcp.cli --transport http
scripts.test:mcp: cd apps/api && uv run pytest tests/test_mcp*.py -v
